news.headline: SOHO announces new half-day CME anemia in MDS/MPN workshop. Presession on MDS/MPN-related anemia. HOUSTON, April 3, 2025.
news.summary: SOHO has introduced a presession on MDS/MPN-related anemia for SOHO 2025, occurring in HOUSTON on April 3, 2025. The four-hour live, CME-certified session focuses on Clinical Success. Interested individuals can register for the presession and the main event at soho.click/2025.

news.headline: Schimenti Construction opens Printemps at One Wall Street, a 55,000 sq ft store designed for experiential retail.
news.summary: A new chapter in retail unfolds as the renowned Parisian retailer, Printemps, opens its first store in NYC on April 3, 2025. Combining Wall Street vibes with Parisian elegance, the store spans an impressive 55,000 square feet across two floors, ushering in a new era of experiential shopping. The debut store introduces a unique "je ne sais quoi" element to the retail landscape, offering customers a distinctive shopping experience.

news.headline: German Foreign Minister Baerbock: NATO partners will expand European security pillar against threats from Russia
Sigenergy's 2024 ESG Report showcases efforts in sustainability & clean energy. Leading energy innovator driving responsible growth.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Shanghai, Sigenergy, a prominent energy company, unveiled its 2024 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Report. The report showcases the company's initiatives in tackling climate change, promoting clean energy solutions, and supporting a sustainable, low-carbon environment.

news.headline: JamLoop introduces Attribution for CTV buyers, offering full visibility into viewer conversions.Launch on April 3, 2025.
news.summary: JamLoop, a tech provider based in Walnut Creek, California, revealed on April 3, 2025, that they are now offering Attribution services to advertisers and agencies. This new offering provides comprehensive visibility into the conversion rates of Connected TV (CTV) viewers. With this service, clients can gain insights into how their CTV advertising campaigns are performing, enabling them to make data-driven decisions. JamLoop aims to make CTV advertising more accessible and effective for their clients.

news.headline: Farmmi (NASDAQ: FAMI) regains compliance with NASDAQ minimum bid price requirement on April 2, 2025.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Farmmi, Inc., a China-based agriculture products supplier listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol FAMI, announced in Lishui, China that it has received notification from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC confirming that the Company has regained compliance with the NASDAQ listing rule.

news.headline: Orchestry introduces Workspace Review feature for automated recalibration of collaboration workspaces in Microsoft 365.
news.summary: A recent announcement by Orchestry unveils the launch of innovative features aimed at facilitating automated recalibration of collaboration workspaces to uphold security and compliance standards. The introduction of the Workspace Review feature on April 3, 2025, in Vancouver, BC, signifies a pivotal advancement for IT administrators seeking to streamline Microsoft 365 collaboration processes. This latest enhancement underscores Orchestry's commitment to empowering organizations with robust tools for optimizing and maintaining secure digital environments.

news.headline: Spring inventory up 10.2% YoY, but pending sales down 5.2% in metros due to economic uncertainty. Price drops highest since 2016.
news.summary: In March, new listings in the U.S. housing market reached their highest level in three years, showing a 10.2% increase from the previous year. However, pending home sales in larger metro areas experienced a 5.2% year-over-year decline as buyers were cautious. The share of price drops in March was the highest since 2016. These trends were observed in the latest data from the real estate market. The data was released from AUSTIN, Texas, on April 3, 2025.

news.headline: Acuity reports Q2 fiscal 2025 results with sales growth and EPS expansion.
news.summary: Consistent performance yielded a rise in sales and an expansion of earnings per share for the company.

news.headline: Unity and Konami have partnered to develop Survival Kids for Nintendo Switch 2, built on Unity 6.
news.summary: In San Francisco today, Unity revealed their collaboration with Konami Digital Entertainment B.V. to create Survival Kids, an exclusive day-one release title for the new Nintendo Switch™ 2 platform. Developed using Unity 6, the game aims to provide an immersive gaming experience. The partnership with Konami has offered valuable insights for Unity to enhance the performance and stability of the game. This collaboration signifies a strategic move for Unity to leverage the popularity of Nintendo Switch™ 2.

news.headline: Sai Life Sciences inaugurates Peptide Research Center at Hyderabad R&D Campus in India.
news.summary: In Hyderabad, India, on April 03, 2025, Sai Life Sciences Limited (BSE: 544306 I NSE: SAILIFE) launched a specialized Peptide Research Center at its R&D Campus. This organization is an innovator-focused Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO).

news.headline: Russian Foreign Ministry: Bombing nuclear infrastructure would have catastrophic consequences for the entire world
French Foreign Minister: Trump's tariffs will have negative consequences on the economies of NATO member states.
Russian Foreign Ministry: Use of military force against Iran is illegal and unacceptable
ANZ - thinks gold is looking overbought
Deutsche Bank warns of a Dollar confidence crisis
Global economy in shock after Trump's tariffs hit trade partners, spooking investors. Policymakers rush for solutions. #EconomicFallout
news.summary: The recent policy change had far-reaching effects, impacting not only the United States but also its closest trading allies. This unexpected move caused significant concern among investors and caught policymakers off guard, prompting them to quickly develop strategies to address the situation.

news.headline: US Secretary of State Rubio: Trump is not against NATO, he is against a NATO that lacks the necessary capabilities
US Secretary of State Rubio: I want to leave here with every NATO member committing and fulfilling to reach up to 5% spending
US Secretary of State Rubio: The US is as active in nato as it has ever been
Sub-$2 billion stocks close to bear market territory.

Display makers are cutting capacity utilization amid uncertainty over new U.S. tariffs, with a fab utilization above 80% in 1Q25 expected to decrease in 2Q25. Set makers are adopting a conservative approach to panel purchases due to pull-in demand winding down.
news.summary: In London, a recent report from Omdia’s Large Area Display Production Strategy Tracker revealed that display panel manufacturers have been operating with a fab utilization rate exceeding 80% in the first quarter of 2025. However, projections indicate a decrease in utilization expected for the second quarter of the same year. As the initial surge in demand during the first quarter tapers off, set manufacturers are taking a cautious stance towards panel procurement. Factors such as uncertainties linked to new U.S. tariffs on display-related products such as TVs, PCs, and smartphones are influencing this strategic shift.

news.headline: Traders add to BoE rate-cut bets, favouring three more this year.
Former Treasury Secretary Larry Summers warns Trump's tariffs could reduce economy by $30 trillion, causing oil crisis-like shock.
news.summary: Larry Summers, the former Treasury Secretary, recently expressed concerns about President Donald Trump's tariffs, warning that they could lead to an economic crisis similar to an oil shock. Summers compared the tariffs to a supply shock, akin to an oil-price spike or natural disaster, causing a surge in prices and unemployment while reducing productive capacity. He estimated potential economic losses could reach $30 trillion, equating to over $300,000 for a family of four. The reciprocal duties are slated to commence on April 9.

news.headline: Finland president: The coalition of willing agreed that at least one European leader should speak to Russia, France or the UK should be the one to speak to Putin
Barclays expects 2025 US GDP growth to contract to 0.1% on a quarter-on-quarter basis
Irish Trade Minister Harris: Targeting US digital services in reciprocal measures not EU position, different countries may have different perspectives.
OPEC+ ministerial talks are not expected to change oil output policy - Source.
China and Europe pledge to counter Trump's tariffs as markets in Asia plunge due to the hefty levies, sparking economic concerns.
news.summary: Asian markets experienced a significant decline as investors were surprised by the magnitude of the charges imposed. This development has raised concerns among experts, who believe that the worldwide economy may face serious disruptions.

news.headline: IT sector's performance report, including industry stats and data, available on Bloomberg with significant numbers.
OPEC+ ministerial talks start - Source.
German Economy Minister: Trump will buckle under pressure if Europe bands together over tariffs.
UK faced Trump’s tariffs despite charm offensive by PM Keir Starmer. All countries hit with universal base rate.
news.summary: Despite Prime Minister Keir Starmer's extensive efforts to appeal to President Trump, the United Kingdom has been informed that it will face the standard base rate that is imposed on all nations.

news.headline: Veros Q1 2025 VeroFORECAST predicts 2.4% national home price appreciation rate, a slight decrease.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, the VeroFORECAST for Q1 2025 predicts a 2.4% average national home price increase over the next year, signaling a slight decrease from previous projections.

news.headline: Driving digital continuity in product development with a data management hub for BMW to streamline operations.
news.summary: In Amsterdam, as the automotive industry shifts towards electromobility and the incorporation of software in nearly all parts, efficient collaboration among specialized departments is crucial. With shorter development cycles due to competitive demands, traditional data exchange methods like point-to-point interfaces and manual processes are becoming less effective and more error-prone. This highlights the importance of enhanced coordination, as the industry faces growing complexity.

news.headline: SNB's Tschudin: Negative interest rates worked in past, remains an instrument if necessary to stabilise inflation.
Russia's Foreign Ministry: The US needs to realise the belligerent stance of EU and Ukraine, otherwise there may be no chance to reach an agreement - Tass.
Some travelers advocate for refund policies like airlines: 24-hour window to cancel hotel bookings after purchase, ensuring a ski resort nightmare isn't a financial loss.
news.summary: Airline passengers are entitled to a full refund for airfare within 24 hours of booking, but the same does not apply to hotels. This means that a traveler recently discovered they were unable to cancel a mistaken reservation at a ski resort even just two minutes after booking. The discrepancy in refund policies between airlines and hotels raises questions about consumer rights and protections in the travel industry.

news.headline: Trump's tariffs targeting to boost US manufacturing by bringing jobs and factories back, raising questions on feasibility.
news.summary: The president is confident that his trade policies will lead to a significant resurgence in jobs and factories. He believes that these measures will result in the creation of a large number of new jobs and the revitalization of numerous factories across the country. The president's optimism is fueled by the belief that his trade policies will have a substantial impact on the economy, potentially leading to a notable increase in employment and industrial production.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs estimates latest US reciprocal tariffs would further drag China’s GDP growth by about 1 percentage point, taking total drag on China's growth to 1.7 pp.
2025 Industrial Tech Innovation Conference held in Nanjing on March 26. Invited global entrepreneurs, investors, and innovators.
news.summary: In Nanjing, China, the 2025 Industrial Technology Innovation and Investment Promotion Conference took place on March 26, 2025. This event in Jiangsu Province welcomed entrepreneurs, investors, and innovators globally. The conference aimed to foster industrial innovation and investment, highlighting opportunities for collaboration and growth. This initiative sought to stimulate partnerships and drive progress in the industry, with a significant emphasis on enhancing technological advancements and boosting economic development.

news.headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. has acquired Bircroft Insurance Services based in London, with terms undisclosed.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. revealed their acquisition of Bircroft Insurance Services, a company based in London, UK. The specific details regarding the financial terms of this acquisition were not made public. Bircroft, a specialized insurance broker, offers both retail and wholesale services in the industry.

news.headline: Semperis study finds 81% of cyberattacks on utilities target identity systems like Active Directory, Entra ID, Okta.
news.summary: In a recent report released by Semperis, a prominent AI-powered identity security and cyber resilience company, it was revealed that a staggering 81% of cyberattacks on utility companies focus on compromising identity systems like Active Directory, Entra ID, and Okta. The study also highlighted the prevalence of attacks on these critical infrastructure entities. The research, emphasizing the increasing vulnerability of such systems, was conducted in Hoboken, N.J. This alarming trend underscores the urgent need for robust cybersecurity measures to safeguard essential services from malicious cyber threats.

news.headline: Study shows SEBclausii™ aids in acute allergic rhinitis - Specialty Enzymes & Probiotics; published clinical trial.
news.summary: In Chino, California, a clinical trial published on April 3, 2025, revealed that probiotic SEBclausii™ (Alkalihalobacillus clausii 088AE) by Specialty Enzymes & Probiotics is effective in easing symptoms of acute allergic rhinitis. The trial was prospective, interventional, and randomized, highlighting the potential benefits of this probiotic in managing allergies. This study sheds light on the positive impact of SEBclausii™ in providing relief for individuals suffering from acute allergic rhinitis.

news.headline: Procede Software unveils Excede v10.5, enhancing integration with tech platforms and boosting dealership efficiency.
news.summary: A recent update has allowed for smooth incorporation with top-tier technology platforms and introduces smart functions that enhance productivity for dealerships. The upgrade was announced in San Diego on April 3, 2025 by Procede Software, a prominent provider for heavy-duty commercial vehicles, showcasing their commitment to innovation and efficiency in the industry.

news.headline: TAL Education Group to report Q4 and FY2025 results on April 24, 2025. Ended Feb. 28, 2025. China's leading smart learning provider(NYSE: TAL).
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, TAL Education Group, a leading smart learning solutions provider in China, revealed plans to unveil its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 ending on February 28, 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE as TAL, is set to release these important figures soon.

news.headline: New non-profit organization Protect the Emerald Coast Alliance launched in Florida's Panhandle to preserve natural beauty and enhance economic vitality. (Characters: 129)
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Freeport, a non-profit organization called Protect the Emerald Coast Alliance (PECA) was officially launched. This dynamic new organization aims to preserve the beauty and boost the economic vitality of Florida's Emerald Coast. PECA operates as a 501(c4) organization, focusing on conservation efforts and sustainable development in the region. This initiative holds significance for environmental preservation and economic growth in the area.

news.headline: Eurozone PPI MoM Actual 0.2% (Forecast 0.25%, Previous 0.8%)
Eurozone PPI YoY Actual 3% (Forecast 3%, Previous 1.8%)
FDUSD stablecoin assures 1:1 backing after Justin Sun's allegations briefly send it below $1. Issuer plans legal action.
news.summary: The team behind the USD-backed stablecoin First Digital (CRYPTO: FDUSD) responded to concerns about financial stability on Wednesday after the stablecoin briefly depegged due to allegations of insolvency by Justin Sun. First Digital confirmed that they have processed the initial redemptions post the FUD incident and assured that FDUSD is fully backed 1:1. They emphasized that their redemption channels are functioning smoothly. The controversy arose when Justin Sun questioned the solvency of First Digital and its ability to fulfill client redemptions. Despite the turmoil, First Digital maintained that FDUSD remains fully backed 1:1, and all redemption requests are being promptly processed. The team encouraged users to secure their assets.
